### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/worker.py",
  "3:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import asyncio\r\n import logging\r\n import signal\r\n import traceback\r\n from contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n \r\n from prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\n from sqlalchemy import select\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\n from .broker import (\r\n     BrokerMessage,\r\n     ack_job,\r\n     ensure_group,\r\n     enqueue_job,\r\n     push_dead_letter,\r\n     read_jobs,\r\n     reclaim_stuck,\r\n     update_queue_depth,\r\n )\r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\n from .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\n from .models import Job, JobState\r\n from .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n from .tasks import get_task_definition, make_context\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobCanceled(Exception):\r\n     pass\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @asynccontextmanager\r\n async def _session_scope() -> AsyncSession:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         async with session.begin():\r\n             yield session\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n             raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     fields = msg.fields\r\n     job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n     if not job_id:\r\n         logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n         await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n         return\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n     async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job is None:\r\n             logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n             logger.info(\r\n                 \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                 extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n             )\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n         if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n             logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n         if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n             logger.info(\"Job not QUEUED; skipping\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n         job.attempts = attempt\r\n         try:\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n         except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n             logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n     # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n     job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n     task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n \r\n     import time\r\n \r\n     start = time.monotonic()\r\n     JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n \r\n     async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n         await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n \r\n     # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n         result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n         exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n         canceled = False\r\n     except JobCanceled:\r\n         result = None\r\n         exc = None\r\n         canceled = True\r\n     except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n         result = None\r\n         exc = e\r\n         canceled = False\r\n \r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n \r\n     # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n     async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job is None:\r\n             logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         if canceled:\r\n             job.result = None\r\n             job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n             job.cancel_requested = False\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n             JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n         elif exc is None:\r\n             job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             job.last_error = None\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n             JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n         else:\r\n             # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n             job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                 traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n             ).strip()\r\n \r\n             settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n             if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                 await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                 await push_dead_letter(\r\n                     {\r\n                         \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                         \"type\": job.type,\r\n                         \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                         \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                     }\r\n                 )\r\n                 JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n             else:\r\n                 delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                     job.attempts,\r\n                     base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                     multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                     cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                 )\r\n                 job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                 job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                 await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n \r\n     # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n     await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         messages = await read_jobs(\r\n             queue=queue,\r\n             consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n             count=1,\r\n             block_ms=5_000,\r\n         )\r\n         if not messages:\r\n             continue\r\n         for msg in messages:\r\n             try:\r\n                 await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n             except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                 logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n         try:\r\n             await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                 queue=queue,\r\n                 consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                 min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n             )\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n     await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n \r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n     consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n \r\n     tasks = [\r\n         asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n         for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n     ]\r\n     tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n \r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     for t in tasks:\r\n         t.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

traceback\r\n from contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n \r\n from prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\n from sqlalchemy import select\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\n from .broker import (\r\n     BrokerMessage,\r\n     ack_job,\r\n     ensure_group,\r\n     enqueue_job,\r\n     push_dead_letter,\r\n     read_jobs,\r\n     reclaim_stuck,\r\n     update_queue_depth,\r\n )\r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\n from .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\n from .models import Job, \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @asynccontextmanager\r\n async def _session_scope() -> AsyncSession:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         async with session.begin():\r\n             yield session\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n             raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     fields = msg.fields\r\n     job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n     if not job_id:\r\n         logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n         await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n         return\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n     async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job is None:\r\n             logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n             logger.info(\r\n                 \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                 extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n             )\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n         if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n             logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n         if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n             logger.info(\"Job not QUEUED; skipping\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n         job.attempts = attempt\r\n         try:\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n         except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n             logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n     # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n     job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n     task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n \r\n     import time\r\n \r\n     start = time.monotonic()\r\n     JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n \r\n     async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n         await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n \r\n     # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n         result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n         exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n         canceled = False\r\n     except JobCanceled:\r\n         result = None\r\n         exc = None\r\n         canceled = True\r\n     except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n         result = None\r\n         exc = e\r\n         canceled = False\r\n \r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n \r\n     # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n     async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job is None:\r\n             logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n             await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n             return\r\n \r\n         if canceled:\r\n             job.result = None\r\n             job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n             job.cancel_requested = False\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n             JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n         elif exc is None:\r\n             job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             job.last_error = None\r\n             await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n             JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n         else:\r\n             # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n             job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                 traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n             ).strip()\r\n \r\n             settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n             if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                 await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                 await push_dead_letter(\r\n                     {\r\n                         \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                         \"type\": job.type,\r\n                         \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                         \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                     }\r\n                 )\r\n                 JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n             else:\r\n                 delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                     job.attempts,\r\n                     base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                     multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                     cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                 )\r\n                 job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                 job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                 await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n \r\n     # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n     await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         messages = await read_jobs(\r\n             queue=queue,\r\n             consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n             count=1,\r\n             block_ms=5_000,\r\n         )\r\n         if not messages:\r\n             continue\r\n         for msg in messages:\r\n             try:\r\n                 await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n             except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                 logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n         try:\r\n             await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                 queue=queue,\r\n                 consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                 min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n             )\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n     await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n \r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n     consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n \r\n     tasks = [\r\n         asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n         for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n     ]\r\n     tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n \r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     for t in tasks:\r\n         t.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
